query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `survey_responses` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`attendanceStatus` enum('attend','not_attend','reviewing') NOT NULL,
	`businessName` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
	`contactName` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`contactPhone` varchar(30) NOT NULL,
	`email` varchar(320),
	`businessRegion` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	`businessRegionDetail` varchar(100),
	`salesExperience` enum('under1','1to3','3to5','5to10','over10') NOT NULL,
	`annualSalesVolume` enum('under100','100to300','300to500','500to1000','over1000') NOT NULL,
	`salesTarget` enum('enduser','b2b','both') NOT NULL,
	`installationMethod` enum('own_team','outsource','mixed') NOT NULL,
	`installationStaff` enum('none','1to2','3to5','6to10','over10') NOT NULL,
	`iotExpansionIntent` enum('already','reviewing','interested','none') NOT NULL,
	`attendancePurpose` text NOT NULL,
	`attendancePurposeOther` text,
	`interestedProducts` text,
	`additionalInquiry` text,
	`submittedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`ipAddress` varchar(45),
	CONSTRAINT `survey_responses_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
